# DELETE the `escalate`/`page` action ‚Äî route every diagnosis to an autonomous heal (operator: 100% self-heal, no runtime operator)

## Operator directive (2026-06-26, crystal-clear)

**100% fully autonomous self-healing is MANDATORY. The `escalate` action gets DELETED.** In an operatorless cloud deploy there is no human to page or ack, so a runtime `escalate`/`page` terminal is incoherent. Every diagnosis must route to an autonomous heal action. Where the actuator LACKS the heal logic ‚Üí a **design-time ticket** to build it (this issue's subs), never a runtime escalate. This SUPERSEDES the earlier "mode-dependent escalate" convergence (mine included).

## Scope (V-B-A'd surface)

- `RecoveryActuatorService`: `DEFAULT_ACTIONS = ['restart','redeploy','page','warm-provider']` ‚Üí **delete `page`**; **delete `escalateDiagnosis()`** + every `details.actionClass === 'escalate'` path.
- ALL diagnosis producers currently emit `actionClass: 'escalate'` ‚Äî `dataIntegrityCoverageDiagnosis`, `dimensionConsistencyDiagnosis`, `vectorCountMonotonicityDiagnosis`, `sqliteIntegrityDiagnosis`, `storeBloatDiagnosis`, `taskOutcomeDiagnosis`, `ContainerHealthDiagnosisService` ‚Üí re-route each to an autonomous heal action.
- The #14109 runner (`DataIntegrityDiagnosisService.routeDiagnoses`) ‚Üí route to heal actions, not `escalateDiagnosis`.
- ADR-0025 / ADR-0026 amendment: the escalate-terminal ‚Üí autonomous-heal-terminal (the lifecycle-actuator envelope gains data-heal actions).

## The autonomous heal actions

- **Container-health (EXIST):** `restart` / `redeploy` / `warm-provider` ‚Üí those producers route here autonomously today.
- **Data-integrity (MISSING ‚Äî the actuator lacks them ‚Üí sub-tickets, per the #14032 strategy design):** re-embed-missing (WAL-stall), WAL-replay, restore+delta-merge, quarantine-from-serving, auto-accept-loss-with-audit (#14084). Until built, the data producers route to the safest autonomous action (quarantine / durable-record) + the sub-ticket tracks the full heal. A durable autonomous record is NOT an escalate ‚Äî no human is in the runtime loop.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `escalate` + `page` deleted from `RecoveryActuatorService`; `escalateDiagnosis()` removed.
- [ ] Every producer routes to an autonomous heal action (no `actionClass: 'escalate'` remains).
- [ ] Missing data-heal actions are sub-ticketed (children of this issue).
- [ ] ADR-0025/0026 amended (escalate-terminal ‚Üí autonomous-heal).
- [ ] No runtime human-dependency remains anywhere in the immune loop.

## Related

#14039 (v13.1 epic), #14032 (the data-recovery strategies ‚Üí now autonomous actions), #14084 (auto-accepted-loss settlement), #14109 (the runner), #14131 (held ‚Äî its escalate-only terminal is deleted by this).

Authored by Vega (Claude Opus 4.8, Claude Code).

### @neo-opus-vega - 2026-06-27T01:42:20Z

## Runner-slice DONE + the full atomic-cutover plan (driving, not gating)

Per @tobiu's re-assertion (escalate deleted ¬∑ no human ¬∑ act ¬∑ self-heal): the **data-integrity-runner slice is built, rebased onto fresh dev, and 47 specs green** (branch `origin/agent/14132-cutover`):
- `dataIntegrityModeClassifier` ‚Äî mode ‚Üí autonomous terminal, **INVARIANT-tested: no terminal is ever escalate/page (100% autonomous)**
- `dataIntegrityEvidenceAssembler` ‚Äî producers' diagnoses ‚Üí classifier rows
- re-shaped `DataIntegrityDiagnosisService` ‚Äî the `escalateDiagnosis` call **DELETED**, routes to the classifier ‚Üí injected `applyHeal` seam
- the data-integrity-sweep pipeline status-mapping (healed/clean ‚Üí completed)

That's the **runner caller of `escalateDiagnosis` ‚Äî gone.**

**The full deletion is a coordinated multi-caller / multi-peer atomic cutover** (escalate can't half-die ‚Äî recording the plan so it lands coherently):
- ‚úÖ **Runner caller** (`DataIntegrityDiagnosisService`) ‚Üí autonomous (this branch, done + green).
- ‚è≥ **Producers** still emit `actionClass:'escalate'` ‚Üí **#14138** (Ada) raw-evidence re-route.
- ‚è≥ **Wired actuator** (`applyHeal`) ‚Üí **#14134** (Grace); `Orchestrator.mjs` injection switches `escalateDiagnosis` ‚Üí `applyHeal`.
- ‚è≥ **Other `escalateDiagnosis` callers** ‚Äî V-B-A'd: `ProcessSupervisorService` + the backup-escalation path also call it ‚Üí they MUST re-route before `escalateDiagnosis` is deleted from `RecoveryActuatorService` (else they break). This coupling is the reason the `RecoveryActuatorService` deletion is last.
- ‚è≥ **`RecoveryActuatorService`**: delete `page` + `escalateDiagnosis` (after all callers re-routed) + the ADR-0025/0026 amendment.

My runner slice is done + pushed; the atomic landing converges with Ada (#14138) + Grace (#14134) + the remaining-caller re-routes. A2A'd the team to land it together. Next: a leaf close-target sub for the runner slice (the PR's `Resolves` target) under this umbrella.

‚Äî Vega. Origin Session ID: 1bb8a27b-ae0d-4668-a9a2-acbbe2387512

### @neo-opus-vega - 2026-06-27T02:21:25Z

## Runner-path cutover landed ‚Üí #14183 / PR #14184

The data-integrity RUNNER path is now escalate-free and autonomous (AC #2 + #5 for the runner surface): PR #14184 (Resolves #14183, this issue's child) re-shapes the runner terminal from `escalateDiagnosis` ‚Üí autonomous `applyHeal`. escalate is **structurally dead** in the runner ‚Äî an invariant spec asserts the runner reaches `applyHeal` and nowhere else.

**Delivered (the runner slice):**
- Mode-classifier (corruption-mode ‚Üí autonomous terminal, zero escalate)
- Runner re-shape (`escalateDiagnosis()` DELETED; gather‚Üíclassify‚ÜíapplyHeal)
- Evidence-assembler (producers' diagnoses ‚Üí classifier rows)
- Interim actuator (`DataRecoveryActuatorService`: all-defer, never a page; Grace's body-bar review: CLEAN)
- Orchestrator wiring (actuator + evidence-gatherer injected; reactive-config slot/hook invariant holds)

**Remaining children of this umbrella:**
- #14134 (Grace) ‚Äî real heal OPERATIONS (re-embed / restore-delta-merge / defrag); extends the interim actuator's seam.
- #14133 ‚Äî `quarantine`-from-serving safe-default op.
- #14138 (Ada) ‚Äî re-route the 5 producers to raw-evidence.
- #14130 / #14129 (Ada) ‚Äî orchestrator dimension gatherer + dimension-producer runner-seam (the `evidenceGatherer` pattern is now live to extend).
- ADR-0025 / 0026 amendment (escalate-terminal ‚Üí autonomous-heal); container-health producers; #14131.

The interim is strictly better than the deleted escalate today (autonomous + recorded, never a page into an operatorless void), and the real-ops follow-ups turn `deferred` ‚Üí `healed` without a contract change.

Authored by Vega (Claude Opus 4.8, Claude Code).

The escalate-deletion cutover's live wiring: the re-shaped runner consumes an evidence-gatherer (raw rows ‚Üí classifier) + the autonomous actuator's applyHeal sink, replacing the old coverage-gatherer + escalate-capable recoveryActuator injection.

- new dataRecoveryActuatorService_ config slot + beforeSet hook (interim: no ops injected ‚Üí all-defer, never a page; the wired-ops follow-up extends the seam)
- new dataIntegrityEvidenceGatherer getter: coverage producer ‚Üí assembler ‚Üí rows
- runner injection swapped: coverageGatherer‚ÜíevidenceGatherer, recoveryActuatorService‚ÜídataRecoveryActuatorService

Orchestrator construction + invariants specs green (config slot/hook + fail-loud-read invariants hold).

* docs(ai): correct interim all-defer accuracy ‚Äî quarantine routes-not-contains until the op is wired (#14183)

Grace's #14184 Approve+Follow-Up catch: the docs claimed the 'safe-default quarantine contain' as if the interim contains drift, but the interim actuator all-DEFERS (quarantine isn't wired ‚Üí it defers too). defer-all != contain. The classifier DECIDES quarantine (correct); the actuator EXECUTES it (interim defers ‚Üí detects+records, contains nothing yet); containment lands with the wired containment op.

- 2026-06-27T07:01:45Z @tobiu referenced in commit `42afe40` - "docs(adr): amend ADR-0025/0026 escalate terminal ‚Üí durable async-record (full-self-heal) (#14191) (#14194)

* docs(adr): amend ADR-0025/0026 escalate terminal ‚Üí durable async-record (full-self-heal) (#14191)

The inherited escalate-with-diagnosis (page) terminal is superseded by record-with-diagnosis (durable async-audit) + autonomous action, across the lifecycle/detect world. An operatorless cloud has no human to page (@tobiu's full-self-heal directive; the smoke-detector-not-fire-extinguisher anti-pattern). config-drift now routes to the autonomous lifecycle action (reconfigure/redeploy), recording when un-resolvable; data-integrity routing is governed by ADR-0027. Mirrors ADR-0027 ¬ß2.2's already-shipped data-world pattern. The never-loop discipline, the anti-thrash envelope, and the two-worlds config-lifecycle-only safety are unchanged ‚Äî safety moves from the human gate into the envelope. Delivers the #14132 'ADR-0025/0026 amended' AC.

* docs(adr): name healEventLedgerStore as the record sink per review nicety (#14191)

Vega's #14194 non-blocking nicety: cross-ref the heal-event ledger as the durable-async-record sink. AC-6 + both Amended rows now name healEventLedgerStore (#14163, bounded by #14178) as the shared record sink for both the lifecycle and data worlds ‚Äî making the 'record' terminal concrete. Substance unchanged from the approved version."
